common.tenantText: Your platform is isolated under tenant workspace

auth.loginSubtitle: Access the craft village administration dashboard or system management portal.
auth.connectionError: Connection error: Unable to connect to the Back-End server (404 Not Found).
auth.registerSubtitle: Create a traveler account to explore Vietnam's heritage map and experience traditional culture.
auth.registerSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email to activate your account.
auth.validationPhone: Phone number must contain exactly 10 digits.
auth.validationPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters, with at least 1 uppercase letter, 1 number, and 1 special character.
auth.validationName: Full name must be at least 2 characters.
auth.duplicateEmail: This Email address is already in use on the system.
auth.visitorBenefits2: Plan customized journeys and book workshops.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your registered email address to receive a password reset link.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccessDesc: We have sent a password recovery link to your email address. Please check your inbox to continue setting up a new password.
auth.resetPasswordErrorDesc: Valid recovery code not found. The link may have been modified or is incomplete. Please check again.
auth.resetPasswordDesc: Please enter your new password and confirm it below.
auth.resetPasswordSuccessDesc: Your password has been successfully updated. You will be automatically redirected to the Login page in {count} seconds.
auth.forgotPasswordQuoteDesc: Don't worry if you temporarily forget your heritage workspace entry. HoaLang is always ready to support you in setting up a new key to continue your journey of preserving Vietnamese culture.
auth.forgotPasswordQuoteHeader:
Recover your entry,
continue weaving dreams.
auth.forgotPasswordFailed: Failed to send password recovery request.
auth.loginQuoteHeader: Preserving the soul, cherishing Vietnamese hands.
auth.loginQuoteDesc: Every thread of Hang Kenh silk, every Bat Trang clay vase is the thousand-year accumulation of the Red River's water and mother earth's silt. Log in to build and introduce your heritage to the world.
auth.registerQuoteHeader: Weaving the threads of time, preserving cultural essence.
auth.registerQuoteDesc: Join the journey of digitizing Vietnam's heritage. Create a unique website for your craft village, connect direct online trade of authentic fine arts, and welcome cultural workshop visitors.
auth.resetPasswordQuoteHeader: A key to open, a new page to begin.
auth.resetPasswordQuoteDesc: Enter your secure new password. We recommend using a strong password to fully protect your heritage data and craft village account info.
auth.resetPasswordInvalidTokenTitle: Valid password reset token not found.
auth.activationSuccessDesc: Welcome to HoaLang. Your account has been successfully verified. Redirecting you shortly.
auth.activationFailedDesc: Your verification link has expired or is invalid. Please register again to request a new link.
auth.resetPasswordError: Password reset failed. The token may be expired or invalid.
auth.newPasswordPlaceholder: Minimum 6 characters, 1 uppercase, 1 number, 1 special char...

hero.title: Touch the Essence
hero.subtitle: A journey through traditional craft villages — where the hands of artisans preserve the soul of a thousand-year-old culture.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Three steps to start your journey
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse over 120 traditional craft villages across 8 cultural regions of Vietnam on an intuitive map.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Artificial intelligence analyzes your preferences and timing, generating a unique itinerary for each journey.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Join hands-on workshops with local artisans and bring home authentic, meaningful handcrafted items.

quote.text: Each pottery vase is a poem about clay — the artisan works in silence yet with nimble hands, creating eternity from what was once merely earth.
quote.author: Nguyen Van Binh
quote.title: Meritorious Artisan — Bat Trang Pottery Village

cta.label: Personalized Journey
cta.title: Let AI Craft Your Itinerary
cta.desc: Enter your email to receive a personalized craft village exploration itinerary, custom-tailored for you by HoaLang AI.
cta.successDesc: Your itinerary is being prepared — please check your email.
cta.footer: No account required  •  100% Free  •  4 languages supported

footer.desc: A platform connecting travel and preserving the heritage values of Vietnamese traditional craft villages. A journey to cherish the soul of the nation.

dashboardPayment.title: Payment Settings
dashboardPayment.subtitle: Configure your own PayOS account to receive money directly
dashboardPayment.guideStep2: Go to PayOS Dashboard → Integration Info
dashboardPayment.guideStep3: Copy the three keys: Client ID, API Key, Checksum Key and paste them into the form below.
dashboardPayment.statusNotConnected: Payment not configured — Customers can only checkout with COD
dashboardPayment.webhookHelp: Copy and fill this Webhook URL into your PayOS Dashboard so that the system automatically updates order status when customers pay successfully.
dashboardPayment.errorSave: Connection failed. Please verify your API keys.

checkout.payCodDesc: Direct cash payment to the artisan upon arrival or delivery.
checkout.payPayosDesc: Scan VietQR code for safe and immediate transfer directly into the craft village's account.
checkout.payPayosDisabledDesc: Online payment is not configured yet. Please select COD instead.
checkout.payPayosTooltip: This craft village has not integrated their PayOS gateway yet.
checkout.successSub: 🎉 Thank you for supporting traditional Vietnamese heritage!
checkout.instructionsDesc: Your order has been recorded successfully. Please prepare the exact cash amount to pay directly to the master artisan upon delivery or arrival.
checkout.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
checkout.errorDatabase: Matching database item not found. Please run backend seeder.
checkout.errorTxDesc: An error occurred while processing your checkout request.

villagesList.title: Heritage Journey
villagesList.subtitle: Discover the exquisite traditional craft villages across Vietnam, where the nation's artistic soul is preserved.
villagesList.noResults: No craft villages found matching your filter criteria.

shopList.title: Heritage Boutiques
shopList.subtitle: Trade directly with Vietnam's leading traditional artisan studios. Supporting local communities.
shopList.noResults: No boutiques found matching your search.

profile.title: Heritage Profile
profile.subtitle: View your heritage account details and manage collaboration activities with master artisans.
profile.phoneError: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits.
profile.nameError: Full name must be at least 2 characters.
profile.ordersSubtitle: Review your journey supporting craft heritage through purchased items and registered workshops.
profile.emptyOrders: You have not made any transactions yet.

vouchers.title: Heritage Vouchers
vouchers.subtitle: Discover and apply promotion campaigns in support of master artisans.

payment.successSubtitle: Thank you for supporting Vietnamese craft heritage!
payment.cancelSubtitle: The online payment transaction has been cancelled by the user.

dashboardSettings.title: Heritage Space Configuration
dashboardSettings.subdomainHelp: * Subdomain is locked after onboarding. Contact Super Admin to request custom DNS setup.
dashboardSettings.addressTitle: Địa chỉ thực tế & Tọa độ di sản / Location & Map Coordinates
dashboardSettings.addressLabel: Địa chỉ làng nghề / Street Address
dashboardSettings.saveSuccessDesc: Craft village contact details have been synchronized.
dashboardSettings.mapTitle: Bản đồ vị trí lò/xưởng / Interactive Heritage Map
dashboardSettings.mapHelp: * You can click on the map or drag the red pin to fine-tune the exact coordinates. If map fails to load, please manually enter latitude/longitude above.
dashboardSettings.accuracyLabel: Độ chính xác tọa độ / Coordinates Accuracy
dashboardSettings.invalidCoords: Invalid coordinates. Please verify latitude is between -90 and 90, and longitude is between -180 and 180.

onboardingCheck.approvedTitle: Congratulations! Your Heritage Space is Approved
onboardingCheck.approvedDesc: Your registration request to become a heritage partner has been approved by the Super Admin. Your unique digital storefront is ready.
onboardingCheck.credentialsAlert: Your administration login details and a generated secure password have been sent to your contact email address. Please make sure to check both your inbox and Spam folder.
onboardingCheck.rejectedDesc: We regret to inform you that your request to register a digital craft space has been declined due to incomplete verification details or misalignment with the platform's focus.
onboardingCheck.rejectedContact: Please contact our support administration or try re-applying with more descriptive details.

adminDashboard.authRequired: Please log in to access the system administration portal.
adminDashboard.authForbidden: Your account does not have permission to access the system administration portal.
adminDashboard.pageDesc: Supervise partner registration (Multi-Tenant Applications), provision isolated database clusters, approve craft village sites, and monitor transactional commission cuts.
adminDashboard.noPendingApplications: No new registration applications are currently pending approval.
adminDashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search craft villages by name, slug, or province...
adminDashboard.noResults: No craft villages match the search keyword.
adminDashboard.feeDesc: The system automatically charges transactional commissions directly from completed orders (Crafts & Workshops) processed through tenant payment integrations.
adminDashboard.feeAutoRulesDesc: System fees are settled instantly upon completion of checkout processing by partner banks. Revenues accrue directly to the main system reserve wallet.
adminDashboard.txnFooterText: Data is synchronized in real-time through the HoaLang Multi-Tenant core engine ledger.
adminDashboard.descPottery: An artistic layout tailored for ceramics and pottery studios. Features glazed earthenware collections, artisan profiles, and historical kiln storytelling.
adminDashboard.descSilk: An editorial magazine-style layout celebrating weaving looms, pure raw silkworm spinning, and premium silk categorization.
adminDashboard.descPaper: A minimalist theme with organic dó paper textures and rustic wood aesthetics. Emphasizes typography whitespace and photography.
adminDashboard.placeholderDesc: Enter historical context or specialty crafts...
adminDashboard.validationError: Please fill in the village name, subdomain slug, and contact email!
adminDashboard.credentialsDesc: The onboarding request for {tenant} has been successfully approved. Login details are listed below:
adminDashboard.credentialsPasswordExistingDesc: Preserve the current password of the existing user account
adminDashboard.credentialsFooter: * The account password has been automatically generated and sent to the partner's email. For security reasons, Super Admin cannot view this password.
adminDashboard.toastSyncDesc: Isolated subdomain mappings and MongoDB databases have been synchronized.
adminDashboard.toastToggleStatusDesc: Website visibility is now toggled to: {status}.
adminDashboard.toastApproveDesc: Website {name} is now accessible through its designated subdomain.
adminDashboard.toastRejectDesc: The application for {name} has been rejected.
adminDashboard.toastOnboardingSentDesc: Your application is pending Super Admin approval.
adminDashboard.toastRateUpdateDesc: System revenues have been automatically adjusted to the new rate.
adminDashboard.logForceSync: FORCE SYNC: Forced database synchronization and DNS configuration completed for craft village: {name}.
adminDashboard.logOnboardingSuccess: 🎉 ONBOARDING APPROVED: Request for {name} successfully processed.
adminDashboard.logDbProvisioning: DATABASE PROVISIONING: Isolated database provisioning (tenant_{slug}) finalized for {name}.
adminDashboard.logDomainConfig: DOMAINS: Official subdomain route https://{slug}.hoalang.site successfully distributed.
adminDashboard.logAuthAdmin: AUTH: Owner permissions successfully granted to {email}.
adminDashboard.logRegistrationRejected: REGISTRATION DECLINED: Registration request for {name} declined due to failed verification.
adminDashboard.rejectModalDesc: You are about to reject the craft village registration for {name}. Please provide a reason so the system can send a notification email to the applicant.
adminDashboard.rejectReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Incomplete documentation — please provide a business license and photos of the actual workshop...
adminDashboard.rejectReasonRequired: Please enter a rejection reason to send an email notification to the applicant.
adminDashboard.rejectModalNote: The rejection reason will be emailed to the applicant's registered address. Please write a specific, clear, and respectful explanation.

onboarding.slugHelp: * The unique digital address of your craft village site.
onboarding.emailHelp: * Access credentials will be sent here after admin approval.
onboarding.artisanNamePlaceholder: e.g. Master Artisan Nguyen Van A
onboarding.descriptionPlaceholder: Provide a brief description of your heritage craft and specialty products...
onboarding.statusCreatingRequest: Creating partner application for Super Admin review...
onboarding.successMessage: Your registration request has been submitted successfully! The application is pending review. Administrative credentials will be automatically generated and sent to email: {email} once approved.
onboarding.offlineSuccessMessage: Demo application submitted successfully! (Offline simulation mode)
onboarding.validationFieldsError: Please fill in all required fields (excluding photo uploads and description).
onboarding.validationPhoneError: Invalid contact phone number (must be 9-11 digits).
onboarding.logoPlaceholder: Upload square or circular logo image for your village
onboarding.coverPlaceholder: Upload the most beautiful cover photo of your village
onboarding.emailConfirmationNotice: We have sent a confirmation email to {email}. You will be notified via email once your application has been reviewed.
